description: Composition:Sea blue round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking Remove promptly 5. Line dry inside out in shade 6. Warm iron only 7. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Comfort FitDeclare your love for iconic singer Freddie Mercury a.k.a. Farrokh Bulsara with this tee from tantra. Freddie's chartbuster "I want to break free" is a popular anthem of the youth brigade. Born to Indian parents in Zanzibar, Farrokh was given the name of "Freddie" by his schoolmates at St Peter's English boarding school in Panchgani, where he discovered his love for music. ring around that love again and again in this t-shirt, coupled best with jeans and cargos.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-18"
